name: Scrambled Eggs with Cactus
recipeInstructions:
1. Use 1 8-oz can of drained and rinsed Nopalitos (cactus pieces).
2. In a bowl, whisk together the eggs, milk, salt, and pepper until well combined.
3. Melt the margarine or butter in a non-stick pan over low heat.
4. Add the chopped onion to the pan and sauté until translucent.
5. Pour the egg mixture into the pan and stir gently with a spatula.
6. Cook the eggs on low heat, stirring occasionally, until they are set but still slightly runny.
7. Remove from heat and serve immediately.
